raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding unauthorized charges and Citibanks handling of my dispute. 

On XX/XX/year>, I discovered XXXX unauthorized {$1.00} attempts on XXXX. I immediately contacted Citibank, closed the card, and requested a replacement. Despite this, the next morning a {$990.00} charge appeared on XXXX using the same number. 

I promptly reported this fraud and spoke with Citibank multiple times. However, I was told that I might need to pay the amount first and only later receive a credit. This response is unacceptable and does not provide proper consumer protection. 

The {$990.00} charge was clearly unauthorized. I request that this fraudulent transaction be removed and that Citibank ensure I am not held responsible. I also request that Citibank improve its dispute process so customers are not unfairly burdened when reporting fraud.
